response.justification: The candidate lacks the core embedded C programming experience required for the role, with only one brief mention of C/C++ in a non-embedded context. No demonstrated experience with Linux kernel modification, networking security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or embedded system development is evident. While the resume shows strong software engineering skills in high-level languages and web/mobile development, these do not align with the embedded networking security focus of the position.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to ship production software across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded components)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated project ownership and technical leadership
concerns: No visible experience with embedded C programming or Linux kernel development
No evidence of networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems) in work history
Lacks required native-level Japanese proficiency and embedded firmware experience
